name: purchase-intake
description: Vardalux purchase intake — Telegram deal messages and Gmail invoice processing

tools.name: gmail_check
tools.description: Search Gmail inbox for unread invoice emails. Returns list of emails with sender, subject, body snippet, and attachment info.

query.description: Optional Gmail search query override. Default searches for unread invoice/receipt emails with attachments.

tools.name: gmail_download
tools.description: Download an email attachment from Gmail to a local directory.

tools.name: gmail_mark
tools.description: Mark a Gmail message as read and optionally add/remove labels.

addLabels.description: Label IDs to add (e.g. custom label IDs)

tools.name: gmail_fetch_invoice
tools.description: Fetch and extract full invoice content from a Gmail email. Handles all types: downloads and extracts text from PDF attachments, or fetches hosted invoice pages. Returns invoice_text ready for field extraction, or browser_required:true with a URL if the page needs JavaScript rendering.

invoice_url.description: Invoice URL (for hosted_link type, from gmail_check output)

attachments.description: Attachments array from gmail_check output (for attachment type)

tools.name: pdf_read
tools.description: Extract full text from a PDF file using pdftotext. Returns all text content including headers, line items, totals, and payment instructions.

path.description: Full local path to the PDF file
